info.title: 48 Zodiac Cyber Reader API
info.description: Provides fast, secure analysis of 48 Zodiac zones and detailed dual compatibility scores without requiring API keys. Inputs may be 48-Zodiac IDs or birth-date strings, which are resolved server-side at request time.

get.summary: Get detailed personality analysis for a single 48 Zodiac zone
get.description: Retrieve personality attributes, core impressions and detailed descriptions for a given 48 Zodiac zone by passing either a zone ID (e.g. taurus2) or a birthdate string (e.g. 05-09, 5/9). The server resolves the birthdate to the corresponding zone ID automatically.

parameters.name: sign
parameters.description: 48 Zodiac ID or birthdate string. Supports formats like aries1, 05-09, 5/9. Birthdate is resolved to the corresponding zone ID at request time.

200.description: Success — returns structured single-zone data including id, name, title, and details.

get.summary: Get in-depth destiny-style compatibility analysis between two 48 Zodiac zones
get.description: Retrieve compatibility scores, strength/risk tags, and detailed relationship patterns across emotional, work and life dimensions for two 48 Zodiac signs. Pass either zone IDs or birthdate strings (order-independent). The server resolves birthdates automatically.

parameters.name: sign1
parameters.description: The first person's 48 Zodiac ID or birthdate string. Supports formats like taurus2, 05-09, 5/9.

parameters.name: sign2
parameters.description: The second person's 48 Zodiac ID or birthdate string. Supports formats like cancer1, 07-01, 7/1.

200.description: Success — returns multi-dimensional pairing evaluation including sign1, sign2, title, score, tags, strengths, risks, suggestions, and details.
